title: Partitioned cable joint for superconducting cables
assignee: Massachusetts Institute of Technology; Commonwealth Fusion Systems LLC
status_note: Active, expires 2041-11-08 as displayed; continuation US20250047016A1 pending; indicative
claim_theme: Distributed petal-by-petal partitioned cable joint elements
indep_claim_gist: Partitioned joint of multiple electrically conductive, mutually isolated joint elements, each with first and second mounting regions accepting one petal of each superconducting cable; elements collectively define joint length.
notes: VIPER production lineage; spec targets 1-10 nOhm but no measurement/verification claims; pending continuation can grow claims. Nearest fabrication art to U-010.

title: Cable joints and related technologies for superconducting cables
status_note: JP granted/active as displayed; KR102752285B1 granted; US20230361549A1 abandoned; EP4070412A1 pending; indicative
claim_theme: Pressed malleable-metal (indium-class) demountable cable joint apparatus
indep_claim_gist: Apparatus: conductive member with two mounting regions; pressing structure forces first and second conductors (HTS tape stacks in former channels) into regions; malleable metal between first conductor and member.
notes: US member abandoned per fetched sibling page - enforceable JP/KR today, EP pending. Spec: ~25 joints made and tested, zero failures; no resistance-measurement claims. Cited-by: UKAEA, Microsoft, SWIP (citation-chase fuel).

title: Superconducting joint using exfoliated ReBCO
status_note: Active, expires 2038-08-20 as displayed; GB member withdrawn; indicative
claim_theme: True superconducting REBCO-REBCO bridge joint via exfoliation and oxygen anneal
indep_claim_gist: Method: join ReBCO tapes with exposed regions via bridge of textured ReBCO on oxygen-permeable backing; heat below Ag melting point in low-oxygen environment; anneal below orthorhombic-tetragonal transition in oxygen-rich environment.
notes: Bridge-joint scope; soldered lap joints (C12 production case) are outside literal scope - design-around angle. Global family incl. CN111226322A. Cited-by: Bruker (2024). GB fetched separately this run.

title: Connection structure for superconductor wires
status_note: Active, expires 2038-03-10 as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: Face-to-face oxide-superconductor joint with through-thickness embedment reinforcement
indep_claim_gist: Structure: two superconductor wires with oxide superconducting layers joined face-to-face at connection ends; reinforcement embedment material extends through the thickness direction from one wire to the other.
notes: SuperPower parent; specific embedment limitation is the design-around hinge. No measurement claims. Serves U-010 nearest-structure context.

title: Composite superconducting tape, composite body, preparation method, joint connection or transition method
title_zh: 复合超导带材、组合体及制备方法、接头连接或过渡方法
assignee: Shanghai Jiao Tong University 上海交通大学
status_note: Granted (active as of 2023-07-07) as displayed; US and EP members granted; indicative
claim_theme: Width-offset face-to-face tape pair with conductor strips widening current-transfer channel
indep_claim_gist: Composite tape: two superconducting tapes face-to-face along length with preset width offset leaving spare edge portions; high-conductivity strips attached to spare portions convert narrow edge current path to wide surface channel.
notes: Covers offset lap transitions used in multi-tape co-wound pancakes; CN-origin family with US/EP grants - widest-reach CN record found. SJTU is densest CN filer in cluster.

title: Method for determining persistent critical current of superconducting materials
assignee: United States Department of the Army
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2037-06-28 as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: Closed-loop persistent-current field-decay quality-control measurement method
indep_claim_gist: Method: cool closed-loop superconductor assembly below Tc while applying external field; remove field to induce persistent current; increase temperature; measure magnetic-field variation; calculate persistent critical current.
notes: Closest measurement-method art to U-010; lab-style (field cycle + thermal ramp), not fixture-integrated - the gap WS-P03-1 names. Cited-by: PsiQuantum, CNR.

title: Quality control of high performance superconductor tapes
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2037-08-29 as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: In-line XRD nanocolumn-orientation QC of REBCO tape (tape-level only)
indep_claim_gist: Tape assembly: substrate, buffer, REBCO film with BaMO3 nanocolumnar defects whose XRD-measured orientation lies within claimed tilt range; spec teaches in-line real-time monitoring during tape fabrication.
notes: Tape-level nearest art anchoring WS-P03-5; does not cover joints. CN family member CN109690797B. More central to P04 - flag to orchestrator for cross-cluster dedupe.

title: ReBCO high temperature superconducting tape joining apparatus and joining method of the same
status_note: Expired - fee related as displayed - verify before reliance; indicative
claim_theme: Vacuum diffusion-joining chamber apparatus for REBCO with oxygen-anneal recovery
indep_claim_gist: Apparatus: vacuum chamber with oxygen supply, pump, pressure/temperature instruments, heater, compression block and pressurizer joining exposed ReBCO layers by direct-contact diffusion at 700-1100 C and 0.1-30 MPa.
notes: CPC not displayed on fetched page. Fixture P/T sensing is process-safety only - no resistance feedback or accept/reject claim (WS-P03-2 anchor). CN family member CN105636719A.

title: Method for joining second generation ReBCO high-temperature superconductor in persistent current mode by solid phase atomic diffusion pressure welding and oxygen supply annealing
status_note: Ceased as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: Nine-step persistent-mode REBCO diffusion joining method
notes: Spec (not claims) verifies joints by magnetic field decay: <=1e-15 ohm over 90 days with Rjoint decay formula - the unclaimed verification disclosure bounding WS-P03-1. Family displayed ceased.

title: Low-resistance connection body for high-temperature superconducting wire material and connection method
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2034-10-21 as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: Bulk-superconductor-to-wire joint by crystal growth at contact surface
notes: HTS bulk body (lower melting point) crystallized single-crystal at contact with wire layer; NMR persistent-joint niche. Spec reports 77 K resistance tests. Cited-by: Sumitomo Electric, MIT, Tokamak Energy. Oldest active blocking art after Hitachi.

title: Connection structure body for oxide superconducting wire material and method for manufacturing same
status_note: EP deemed withdrawn 2021-08-10 as displayed; US member US10530070B2 granted; indicative
claim_theme: Oxide-superconductor lap connection structure (Fujikura)
notes: Risk carried by granted US member and CN member CN106663503B, not the withdrawn EP. Fujikura's joint-structure position alongside Furukawa US11289829B2. No measurement claims found.

title: Superconducting joints
status_note: Active, expires 2039-09-15 as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: MRI coil-wire elongate joint placement with thermal-contact arrangement
notes: LTS/MRI filament joints; spec cites <1e-12 ohm at 1 kA. Crowds H01R4/68 but off-REBCO-production scope. Family not displayed on fetched view.

title: Superconducting joint and method for manufacturing same
status_note: Active, expires 2031-08-23 as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: Multifilament joint with intermediate lower-Jc superconductor for current spreading
notes: Spec reports measured joint resistance <=1e-13 ohm (test data, not a measurement claim). Earliest-expiring active record in set (2031 displayed).

title: Method and device for simultaneous joining of multi conductor
status_note: WO stage; KR101308674B1 granted in family; as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: Simultaneous multi-lap soldering fixture with polyhedral lead bar and flux injector
notes: Soldering unit melts solder on plural faces of polyhedral lead bar simultaneously; control unit + flux injector. Acknowledges joint-quality/resistance problem but claims no measurement - WS-P03-2 anchor.

title: Superconducting tape welding apparatus and method
title_zh: 超导带材焊接装置及方法
assignee: 云电英纳超导电缆有限公司(北京) Yundian Yingna (Innost) Superconducting Cable Co., Ltd. Beijing
status_note: Expired - fee related, terminated 2016-10-20 as displayed - verify before reliance
claim_theme: Positioning + pressure + heated-clamp tape splice fixture (Bi-2223 era)
notes: Track/slide positioning system, pressure rod, heater with temperature sensor, 140-220 C for 4-8 s, 20-100 mm overlap. Prior-art substrate for solder-fixture claims; CPC not displayed on fetched view.

title: Welding method of high-temperature superconducting power cable joint and special apparatus thereof
title_zh: 高温超导电力电缆接头的焊接方法及其专用装置
assignee: 甘肃长通电缆科技股份有限公司 Gansu Changtong Cable Technology; 中国科学院电工研究所 Institute of Electrical Engineering, CAS
status_note: Expired - fee related, lapsed 2007-01-03 as displayed - verify before reliance
claim_theme: In-Ag solder rotating-cable joint welding method with inserted heater
notes: Spec reports 0.06 uOhm total joint resistance on 1 m/1 kA cable - measured post-hoc, not claimed as verification. 2001-era CN craft baseline; CPC not displayed on fetched view.

title: Electrical characteristics test apparatus for energized conductor of cold-dielectric HTS cable
title_zh: 低温绝缘高温超导电缆通电导体电气特性实验装置
assignee: 富通集团(天津)超导技术应用有限公司 Futong Group Tianjin Superconductor Technology; 中国科学院电工研究所 Institute of Electrical Engineering, CAS
status_note: Expired - fee related, terminated 2018-07-17 as displayed - verify before reliance
claim_theme: Horizontal LN2 cryostat rig for cable-conductor electrical characterization
notes: Claims cryostat + bushings + LN2 + measurement lead-outs for Ic/insulation/partial-discharge tests; nearest CN art to a joint/conductor test station (WS-P03-1/-4 anchor); lapsed after 3 years.

title: Preparation method of high-temperature superconducting CICC conductor
title_zh: 一种高温超导CICC导体的制备方法
assignee: 中国科学院等离子体物理研究所 Institute of Plasma Physics, CAS (ASIPP)
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2036-07-20 as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: Tension-controlled stranding, jacketing and heat treatment of HTS CICC
notes: 20-250 N graded stranding tensions, <=50 kN threading, 30% void ratio, 890 C/48 h treatment. No joint or measurement claims - ASIPP joint art did not surface in passes (may be unpublished/trade secret). U-028 context.

title: Preparation method of high-temperature superconducting wire (hot-dip solder stacking)
title_zh: 高温超导线的制备方法
assignee: 上海交通大学 Shanghai Jiao Tong University
status_note: Expired - fee related as displayed - verify before reliance
claim_theme: Continuous hot-dip solder joining of stacked narrow REBCO strips
notes: Tin-furnace roller joining at 100-300 C, 0.1-3 m/s line speed - continuous-soldering process art relevant to joint automation; spec tables test Ic/decay/AC loss post-hoc only.

title: High-temperature superconducting cable and high-temperature superconducting magnet
title_zh: 高温超导电缆及高温超导磁体
assignee: 晏超聚能上海科技有限公司 (as displayed: Yanchao Juneng Shanghai Technology Co., Ltd.)
status_note: Active utility model, anticipated expiration 2035-07-23 (10-year UM term) as displayed; indicative
claim_theme: Sub-cable array with bonded heat-conducting layers for quench current sharing
notes: 2025 CN utility model - live CN UM activity in cable/magnet construction; adjacent sub-cables' heat-conducting layers tightly attached for current shunting. Assignee name machine-translated; verify zh registration at citation time.
